q: The old lighthouse stood alone at the edge of the rocky cliff.
a: At the edge of the rocky cliff stood the old lighthouse.

q: The autumn leaves floated gently across the surface of the lake.
a: Across the surface of the lake floated the autumn leaves.

q: A strange bird called loudly from the tallest tree in the forest.
a: From the tallest tree in the forest called a strange bird.

q: The wounded soldier lay silently beneath the ruined wall.
a: Beneath the ruined wall lay the wounded soldier.

q: A narrow path wound through the heart of the dark forest.
a: Through the heart of the dark forest wound a narrow path.

q: The wedding bells rang cheerfully in the distance.
a: In the distance rang the wedding bells cheerfully.

q: The golden sun sank slowly behind the mountain range.
a: Behind the mountain range sank the golden sun slowly.

q: A group of teenagers danced wildly in the middle of the street.
a: In the middle of the street danced a group of teenagers wildly.

q: The distant train approached steadily along the coastal railway.
a: Along the coastal railway approached the distant train steadily.

q: An ancient oak tree stood firmly beside the crumbling cottage.
a: Beside the crumbling cottage stood an ancient oak tree firmly.

q: Into the playground ran the cheerful children joyfully.
a: Into the playground ran the cheerful children joyfully.

q: Through the open window drifted the scent of roses softly.
a: Through the open window drifted the scent of roses softly.

q: Above the quiet countryside shone a full moon brightly.
a: Above the quiet countryside shone a full moon brightly.

q: Beside the riverbank painted a young artist quietly.
a: Beside the riverbank painted a young artist quietly.

q: Down the muddy road trotted the old horse slowly.
a: Down the muddy road trotted the old horse slowly.

q: At the end of the corridor appeared a tall figure suddenly.
a: At the end of the corridor appeared a tall figure suddenly.

q: Above the city skyline exploded bright fireworks.
a: Above the city skyline exploded bright fireworks.

q: Throughout the concert hall echoed the sound of the violin.
a: Throughout the concert hall echoed the sound of the violin.

q: Along the trail moved the mountain goats cautiously.
a: Along the trail moved the mountain goats cautiously.

q: Above the fishing boats circled a flock of seagulls noisily.
a: Above the fishing boats circled a flock of seagulls noisily.

q: In the corner of the classroom lay a pile of books forgotten.
a: In the corner of the classroom lay a pile of books forgotten.

q: Across the open plain howled the desert wind fiercely.
a: Across the open plain howled the desert wind fiercely.

q: Through the snowy hills wandered a lone wolf quietly.
a: Through the snowy hills wandered a lone wolf quietly.

q: In the empty room flickered the candlelight softly.
a: In the empty room flickered the candlelight softly.

q: In the morning breeze waved a faded flag gently.
a: In the morning breeze waved a faded flag gently.
